---
title: "Data Exploration"
subtitle: "Finding patterns in structured data"
---

Exploration is how I learn what the data can (and cannot) answer before building models or dashboards.

## Focus areas

- Grouped summaries, proportions, and distributions
- Filtering and reshaping tables for clear comparisons
- Visual EDA with charts that match the question
- Spotting leakage, imbalance, and data quality issues early

## Projects

Personal exploration write-ups will live here. Use the sidebar to open individual project pages as they are published.
